qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist A (serial #15) shifts from replayed helper insertion to fresh confidence and branch tuple refactors

executionHints.description: Checklist A (serial #15) targets fresh refactors in confidence parsing and v4/v6 branch tuple assignment

d1ResetRequirement.notes: When run range includes D1, explicit reset avoids stale invocation state

D1.description: Deduplicate confidence level parsing and route rank/code through one token-level helper

D2.description: Introduce a shared special-tuple helper and route v4/v6 special setters through it

operations.pattern:
static void wc_preclass_set_v4_special_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence,?
		const char\* reason_value\)?
\{?
	\*cls = "special";?
	\*rir = "none";?
	\*reason = reason_value;?
	\*confidence = "high";?
\}

static void wc_preclass_set_v6_special_result\(const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence,?
		const char\* reason_value\)?
\{?
	\*cls = "special";?
	\*rir = "none";?
	\*reason = reason_value;?
	\*confidence = "high";?
\}

D3.description: Add v4 branch tuple helpers and route repeated reserved/special branches through helper calls

D4.description: Route v6 special branches to a shared helper and normalize global-unicast confidence literals

operations.pattern: static int wc_preclass_is_v6_loopback\(const struct in6_addr\* addr6\)

static void wc_preclass_set_v6_global_unicast_result\(const char\* normalized,?
		const char\*\* cls,?
		const char\*\* rir,?
		const char\*\* reason,?
		const char\*\* confidence\)?
\{?
	\*cls = "allocated";?
	\*reason = "V6_GLOBAL_UNICAST_2000_3";?
	const char\* guessed_rir = wc_guess_rir\(normalized\);?
	if \(guessed_rir && strcmp\(guessed_rir, wc_preclass_rir_unknown_compare_literal\(\)\) != 0\) \{?
		\*rir = guessed_rir;?
		\*confidence = "medium";?
	\} else \{?
		\*rir = wc_preclass_rir_unknown_compare_literal\(\);?
		\*confidence = "low";?
	\}?
\}
